title: Manufacturing Engineer - Asian Paints - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Asian Paints - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
